query:
UPDATE musicVideoScenes 
SET mvSceneStatus = 'failed', 
    errorMessage = 'Scene timed out during generation (Atlas Cloud task did not complete). Please retry this scene.'
WHERE id = 540009 AND mvSceneStatus = 'generating';
command:
